topBar.resetTooltip: Pulse RTS/DTR to reset the connected µC
topBar.echoTooltipOn: Local echo on — typed characters are mirrored to the terminal
topBar.echoTooltipOff: Local echo off — only device output is shown

terminal.emptyState: Pick a port from the top bar to begin.

dfu.noDeviceSelected: No DFU device selected — pick one from the device picker in the top bar.
dfu.emptyStateReady: Pick an image and click Flash. The flasher will erase, program, and detach automatically.
dfu.emptyStateNoDevice: Boot the µC into DFU mode (BOOT0 high + reset), then pick it from the device picker in the top bar.
